title: Searching for My Mother in Another World
description:
Transported to another world with my whole house and my beloved dog?! A heartwarming x slow life story in a new land begins!
Right after graduating from high school, I, Hatano Sui, lost my father, the only family I had. Among his belongings, I found a deed to a secluded house deep in the mountains. When I went to check it out, I was transferred to another world, along with the entire house and my dog?!
​We were immediately attacked by monsters, but my dog started to display mysterious powers, and somehow, I felt like I was getting stronger too.
​While still trying to figure out things, a beautiful elf girl rushes to our house and claims to be my childhood friend. My dog seems to like her, so she might be telling the truth.
​On top of that, it seems my mother, who I was told had gone missing, is alive and well in this other world...?
author: Fujiwara Yu
